fact_nuggets.text: Full Metal Body (Japanese: Metal Protect) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Solgaleo.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Full Metal Body prevents stat reduction caused by other Pokemon's moves and Abilities (such as Scary Face and Intimidate ), including Sticky Web . Full Metal Body does not prevent self-inflicted stat reductions such as from moves like Superpower or Shell Smash . Full Metal Body only protects from effects that lower stat stages, so it does not prevent stat reduction from items like the Iron Ball , the status conditions paralysis or burn , or the moves Guard Split or Power Split . Full Metal Body does not prevent stat stages being directly modified by Haze , Clear Smog , Heart Swap , Guard Swap , Power Swap , Baton Pass , or Topsy-Turvy . It does not prevent Spectral Thief from stealing (i.e. resetting) positive stat changes. Unlike White Smoke and Clear Body , this Ability cannot be ignored by moves or Abilities . It can still be changed or suppressed. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Full Metal Body has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Full Metal Body prevents stat reduction caused by other Pokemon's moves and Abilities (such as Scary Face and Intimidate ), including Sticky Web . Full Metal Body does not prevent self-inflicted stat reductions such as from moves like Superpower or Shell Smash . Full Metal Body only protects from effects that lower stat stages, so it does not prevent stat reduction from items like the Iron Ball , the status conditions paralysis or burn , or the moves Guard Split or Power Split . Full Metal Body does not prevent stat stages being directly modified by Haze , Clear Smog , Heart Swap , Guard Swap , Power Swap , Baton Pass , or Topsy-Turvy . It does not prevent Spectral Thief from stealing (i.e. resetting) positive stat changes. Unlike White Smoke and Clear Body , this Ability cannot be ignored by moves or Abilities . It can still be changed or suppressed.
Other Pokemon cannot lower this Pokemon's stats.
